"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\_gomoku_core.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\_gomoku_core.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\_gomoku_core.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\C__~1.EXE -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -static -o _gomoku_core.cp312-win_amd64.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\_gomoku_core.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\_gomoku_core.dir\linkLibs.rsp
